subcodes.title: Words to some friends, spoken on 1915-04-22
subcodes.first_line: Under all circumstances man must turn his face toward God and overlook the shortcomings of others, so that he may prosper in his affairs. There are some people who would go any length
subcodes.subjects: @pride; vanity; laying claim to inner knowledge, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @apostles; early disciples of Christ, @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
